title: EndSARS Protest: Coronation Insurance Assures Clients of Quick Processing of Claims Payment
description: Coronation Insurance, formerly Wapic Insurance, has reassured victims of the #EndSARS protest, who bought insurance cover from the company, of speedy compensation through claims payment for their busi
html:
Coronation Insurance, formerly Wapic Insurance, has reassured victims of the #EndSARS protest, who bought insurance cover from the company, of speedy compensation through claims payment for their businesses and assets destroyed during the protest.

The company said in doing this, it believes that insurance companies must ensure that their clients do not have to wait for assistance after a disaster occurs by proactively collating information of damage and losses as well as responding to claims with speed and precision.

“We are well aware that our customers are dealing with numerous difficulties at this time and the last thing they want is a painful and challenging claims process”.

“Following the recent monumental loss of human life and damage to property and assets across the nation, we have shifted to our highest gear to get our customers the most appropriate help as quickly as possible at this time of need”, the company said.

Managing Director of the company, Adeyinka Adekoya, in a statement to reassure the company’s policy holders of support at this critical time, said, “We want our customers to return to their normal way of life as soon as possible and have put in place a claims response platform for real-time communication and easy sharing of loss evidence to fast-track claims processing”.
